description: Cross-print mirror of Zarude V — same Pokemon V card species (Nat. Dex 893, Gen VIII Mythical, franchise's first Dark/Grass dual-type), two different SWSH-era prints. VIV-022 (PLANETA Igarashi) was Zarude V's English-language debut; BRS-016 (5ban Graphics) is the cross-set return. Both holofoil Ultra Rare. The Bulbapedia + Secrets of the Jungle (2020) movie tie-in plus the Dark/Grass first-of-its-type distinction give the pair canonical narrative weight beyond mere shared-species reprint. Mirrored bidirectionally. Standard sigh.
citations: [Wikipedia: Pokemon the Movie: Secrets of the Jungle]
other_candidates_considered: A future zarude-v-character node could anchor any subsequent Zarude / Zarude V / Zarude VSTAR prints. Defer — 2 prints is mirror-tier, not Nodeley-tier.
